findings.detail: FRED API key retrieved via _get_fred_key(): tries MarketMindConfig.fred_key first, then os.environ.get('FRED_KEY', ''). No hardcoded secrets. Returns empty string if unconfigured → graceful skip.
findings.mitigation: Adequate. Key never logged or exposed in responses.

findings.detail: CSV parsing from Treasury.gov and JSON parsing from BIS API trust external data. _parse_float returns 0.0 on any parse failure (graceful). TIC CSV uses DictReader with flexible field name matching (Country/country, Net_Flow_USD_Bn/net_flow).
findings.mitigation: Empty-list returns on HTTP/parse errors. Graceful degradation built in.

findings.detail: _parse_bis_json has complex nested structure parsing that could fail on unexpected API schema changes. Try/except returns empty list on any error.
findings.mitigation: Graceful degradation is adequate. Schema changes would manifest as empty results (logged at WARNING) rather than crashes.

notes: All HTTP calls use verify=True (TLS enforcement — audit finding fix). httpx.AsyncClient properly aclose()d in finally blocks. In-memory cache with per-key asyncio.Lock for thread safety. Graceful degradation: empty lists/None on failure, logged at WARNING. No path traversal, no file writes.
